title:: Filippo Brunelleschi

# Filippo Brunelleschi

Filippo Brunelleschi (1377-1446) was a Florentine architect, engineer
and sculptor recognised as the principal initiator of Renaissance
architecture. His most famous work, the [[Florence Cathedral Dome]],
was completed in 1436 and remains the largest brick dome ever
constructed.
